div.p: Write path, async replication, and eventual consistency windows

text.tspan: Duration: ~50ms typical, up to 500ms under load

div.p: Replication Factor: 3 (1 Primary + 2 Secondaries) • Write: Synchronous to PRIMARY only → ACK at T=0ms • Replication: Async fire-and-forget to secondaries • Read: Any replica can serve (may return stale data) • Consistency: Eventual (secondaries converge within lag window)
